category_sources: Official TA-Lib homepage describes use for technical analysis in financial market trading applications.
source_facts.description says it provides tools for market analysis.
display_name_sources: Official TA-Lib homepage title is "TA-Lib - Technical Analysis Library".
source_facts.name is ta-lib, normalized to official display capitalization TA-Lib.
docs_sources: Official TA-Lib navigation includes Docs, Functions List, and C/C++ API pages.
source_facts.homepage is the official TA-Lib site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/ta-lib/ta-lib, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official homepage lists indicators such as ADX, MACD, RSI, Stochastic, and Bollinger Bands.
Official homepage says the core is written in C/C++ with wrappers available.
source_facts.description says tools for market analysis.
